reasoning: Elon Musk announced the creation of the 'America Party' on X in early July 2025 in protest of a tax bill. Shortly after, several fake party registrations under that name were filed with the FEC. Musk publicly disavowed these filings and reported them as false. As of November 2025, there are no credible reports or official records indicating that Musk has officially filed the necessary FEC paperwork to establish the party, nor has there been any reported significant momentum on this initiative since July. Given the rapidly approaching December 31, 2025 deadline, the lack of follow-through, and the historical low baseline of billionaires forming official third parties, the likelihood of this occurring before the end of the year is very low.
